name: everhour
description: Reads Everhour projects, clients, team members, team time records, per-project tasks and sections, time-off types, time-off allocations, expenses, expense categories, and invoices, and writes client/project/task/section/time-record/expense mutations, through the Everhour REST API.

risk.read: external Everhour API read of project, client, member, time, task, section, time-off, expense, and invoice data
risk.write: external mutation of clients, projects, tasks, sections, time records, and expenses; deletes are irreversible and time-record/expense mutations can affect client billing/invoicing, every write ships with an explicit per-action risk string
risk.approval: required for every delete_* action, archive_project, and update_time_record (time entries may already be invoiced/locked); create/update of clients, projects, tasks, sections, time records, and expenses are low-risk
